---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css?v=20260421b
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="hcc-contact-page hcc-contact-success">
  <div class="hcc-contact-copy">
    <h2>Message Sent</h2>
    <p class="hcc-contact-lead">Thank you. Your message has been submitted successfully.</p>
    <p>I will review it and get back to you as soon as I can.</p>
    <p><a class="hcc-button" href="/contact.html">Back to contact</a></p>
  </div>
</section>
```
